## Requirements

- <a name="requirement_terraform"></a> [terraform](#requirement\_terraform) (>= 1.9, < 2.0)

## Resources

## Required Inputs

The following input variables are required:

### <a name="input_authentication_name"></a> [authentication\_name](#input\_authentication\_name)

Description: The name used for client authentication. This is the identity that will be used in authentication.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_name"></a> [name](#input\_name)

Description: The name of the Client.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_namespace_id"></a> [namespace\_id](#input\_namespace\_id)

Description: The resource ID of the EventGrid Namespace.

Type: `string`

## Optional Inputs

The following input variables are optional (have default values):

### <a name="input_attributes"></a> [attributes](#input\_attributes)

Description: Custom attributes for the client. These can be used in client group queries.

Type: `map(string)`

Default: `{}`

### <a name="input_client_certificate_authentication"></a> [client\_certificate\_authentication](#input\_client\_certificate\_authentication)

Description: Optional settings for client certificate authentication.

Type:

```hcl
object({
    validation_scheme   = string
    allowed_thumbprints = list(string)
  })
```

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_description"></a> [description](#input\_description)

Description: Description for the Client resource.

Type: `string`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_state"></a> [state](#input\_state)

Description: The state of the client. Possible values: 'Enabled', 'Disabled'.

Type: `string`

Default: `"Enabled"`

## Outputs

The following outputs are exported:

### <a name="output_name"></a> [name](#output\_name)

Description: The name of the Client.

### <a name="output_resource"></a> [resource](#output\_resource)

Description: The full Client resource output.

Description: The resource ID of the Client.
